_comment: Merge these keys into ~/.claude/settings.json to wire Claude Code to the Beacon hub (127.0.0.1:8765, ClaudeCodeBridge). ESSENTIAL for the buddy round-trip: the PermissionRequest hook + statusLine. PermissionRequest fires ONLY when a tool actually needs permission (Write, Edit, Bash, MCP, ...) -- unlike PreToolUse, which fires on EVERY tool and would block routine reads if held open. SessionStart/Stop/Notification/SessionEnd are optional (running count + activity feed). RUNNING is NOT a SessionStart counter: SessionStart may not fire via http, so the bridge counts any session it has SEEN recently (first-seen + 10min TTL reaper) and SessionEnd (http, carries session_id) drives clean per-session removal on a normal exit; the TTL backstops SIGKILL/crash. timeout is in SECONDS; PermissionRequest is 600 (its max) to cover the device's ~590s decision window (CC's PermissionRequest default is 600s, so this is the ceiling). If you already have other hooks for these events, ADD these as additional array entries -- do not overwrite. (PreToolUse with a narrow matcher like "Bash" is the back-compat alternative; the bridge still accepts it.) Prefer `./build-app.sh install-hooks`, which merges these keys idempotently and rewrites __BEACON_SHIM__ to the absolute shim path on this machine.
